name: Brownie Ice Cream Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl.
2. Melt margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in cocoa.
4. Blend in sugar, eggs, and vanilla.
5. Blend in dry ingredients and nuts (if desired).
6. Pour batter into foil-lined and lightly greased 15x10x3/4-inch (2L) jelly roll pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for 15 to 17 minutes or until done.
8. Cool completely.
9. Invert the pan and peel off the foil.
10. Cut the brownie crosswise into 3 equal pieces.
11. Place one piece of brownie on a serving plate; spread with half the ice cream.
12. Layer the second piece of brownie and remaining ice cream.
13. Top with the remaining piece of brownie.
14. Wrap in plastic wrap and freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
15. Remove from freezer 10 minutes before serving.
16. Slice and serve with FRY's Chocolate Sauce.
17. Store leftovers in the freezer. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
